commands.command: /bin/zsh -c "wc -l skills/software-advisor/SKILL.md && sed -n '241,480p' skills/software-advisor/SKILL.md && rg -n -i 'crm|customer relationship|客户关系|销售管理' skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json | head -80 && shasum -a 256 skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'"

/bin/zsh -c "wc -l skills/software-advisor/SKILL.md && sed -n '241,480p' skills/software-advisor/SKILL.md && rg -n -i 'crm|customer relationship|客户关系|销售管理' skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json | head -80 && shasum -a 256 skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'"

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '1,210p' skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && command -v sha256sum || true && openssl dgst -sha256 skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && LC_ALL=C date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'"

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '1,210p' skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && command -v sha256sum || true && openssl dgst -sha256 skills/software-advisor/software_catalog.json && LC_ALL=C date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'"
